title: Vanilla Extendeds
description: A twist of the vanilla experience, intuitive and easy for new and expert players! Try it out right NOW!!
body:
Vanilla Extended focuses on respecting the **vanilla experience but with a twist**. The enviroment has very little details and gives you a fresh vibe. We don't include new biomes and any new block, the vanilla ambience and a better experience for the player.

--- 

- New generation **without** enormous and empty landscapes
- **Seasons** for better immersion (Spring, Summer, Autumn and Winter)
- **Quality of life mods** (Carry on, dynamic light, easy magic, ok zoomer, etc)
- Better **animations** for all minecraft mobs with **Fresh animations** and **Fresh moves**
- Really **well optimized** for people with less powerful components
- Individual **skins for mobs** like cows, zombies and pigs
- **Trimmeable tools** and **elytra**
- **3D objects** with resource packs

There is a customized shader for the players who wants a better look

You can install the datapack "All Mob Heads" in the datapacks folder, you can use it if you want in any of your world. (tutorial soon)

---
